name_cn:
🌸 【No packaging for this size]
24ss New Shopping Bag
A unique fusion of art and personality, YSL always has a keen eye, winning the hearts of top fashion icons. The Y-shaped calfskin design is eye-catching, giving a casual, lazy, yet full-of-personality vibe. Extra-large capacity, fits an iPad or laptop. Retro and minimalist design, great for styling and photos!
Style No.: 817602 Black Calfskin
Dimensions: 38-50×33×16cm
